name: Gravity Blaster
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>重力砲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>グラヴィティ・ブラスター</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Equip only to a Machine-Type monster. Once per turn: You can activate this effect; it permanently gains 400 ATK. (This ATK gain remains even if this card leaves the field or the monster becomes unaffected by card effects.) If it battles an opponent's monster, that monster's effect is negated during the Battle Phase only.
eff: Equip only to a Machine-Type monster. Once per turn: You can activate this effect; it permanently gains 400 ATK. (This ATK gain remains even if this card leaves the field or the monster becomes unaffected by card effects.) If it battles an opponent's monster, that monster's effect is negated during the Battle Phase only.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
misc: Equips only to a specific target
